name: Marinade and Basting Sauce for Brisket of Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Pour the marinade over the whole beef brisket, ensuring it is evenly coated.
3. Allow the brisket to marinate for several hours, or overnight if possible.
4. Use the same marinade as a basting sauce during cooking.
